description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a mix of stone-textured walls and wooden accents, including window frames, doors, and railings. The main section has a flat roof with a raised parapet, while an attached wing displays a sloped, corrugated roof. Windows are framed in wood and painted a weathered green, with a combination of rectangular and circular shapes. The front includes a small porch with wooden railings, a set of steps, and a prominent arched entryway. Additional details include a hanging sign, a small balcony, and a chimney on the sloped roof. The overall design suggests a rustic, utilitarian style suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story stone and wood house with a flat roof, sloped side wing, green-framed windows, and a porch with steps and balcony.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with two green windows, a wooden door, and two circular windows, as well as the sloped roof and balcony railing.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main arched entryway, porch steps, a hanging sign, and a mix of rectangular windows and doors, with the balcony and flat roof visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, parapet roof, three green windows in a simple arrangement, and the side of the sloped roof section.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the full height of the flat-roofed section, two tall green windows, and the corrugated sloped roof of the attached wing.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main door with porch steps, wooden railing, and a hanging sign
